---
title: "Fundermentals of R"
subtitle: "Advanced R - 1.0 Data Cleaning"
author: "Prepared By Clinton Moshe Mwachia"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

```{r}
plot(pressure)
```
